# Amit Samant

> Senior iOS Engineer at Rakuten Viki, based in Singapore. WWDC20 Swift
> Student Challenge winner. Organizer of the Swift Bengaluru and Swift
> Bharat developer communities.

Amit Samant builds iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI. He previously worked at
Gojek, Zomato, and Loyalty Juggernaut, and writes about iOS development and
the Swift ecosystem on his blog.

## Links

- [Blog](https://amitsamant.dev/blog): articles on iOS and Swift development
- [Blog llms.txt](https://amitsamant.dev/blog/llms.txt): machine-readable index of the blog
- [GitHub](https://github.com/DominatorVbN)
- [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/amitsamant_dev): @amitsamant_dev
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/amitsamant-dev/)
